name: ghostify
description: Privacy controls for Instagram, Facebook, and Messenger.

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:modules && node test/messenger-send-stability.test.js && npm run test:status && npm run test:release-notes && npm run test:tag-integrity && npm run test:validator && npm run test:package
scripts.test:modules:shared: node test/settings-defaults.test.js && node test/runtime-config.test.js && node test/module-registry.test.js && node test/module-flags.test.js
scripts.test:package: npm run test:package:chromium && npm run test:package:firefox
scripts.lint:firefox: npm run prepare:firefox && web-ext lint --source-dir tmp/firefox-extension --warnings-as-errors
scripts.verify:dist: git diff --exit-code -- dist/background.js dist/js/content.js dist/js/ghost.js dist/js/messenger_patch.js
scripts.ci:chromium: npm run build && npm run test:modules:shared && npm run test:popup:chromium && node test/messenger-send-stability.test.js && npm run test:status && npm run test:release-notes && npm run test:tag-integrity && npm run test:validator && npm run test:package:chromium && npm run validate:extension && npm run validate:tag-integrity && npm run verify:dist && npm run audit:high
scripts.ci:firefox: npm run build && npm run test:modules:shared && npm run test:popup:firefox && node test/messenger-send-stability.test.js && npm run test:package:firefox && npm run validate:firefox && npm run lint:firefox && npm run verify:dist && npm run audit:high
scripts.ci:all-browsers: npm test && npm run validate:extension && npm run validate:firefox && npm run validate:tag-integrity && npm run lint:firefox && npm run verify:dist
scripts.ci:verification: npm run ci:all-browsers && npm run audit:runtime
scripts.ci: npm run ci:all-browsers && npm run audit:high

author: Hendrizzzz
